channel.title: Fun on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Fun on Have an average day :|

item.title: Because no one ever reads the documentation
item.description: [![You're Welcome or not.](https://i1.wp.com/www.thehijax.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/03/Help.png?resize=344%2C601 "Help")](http://www.thehijax.com/?attachment_id=295)Because no one ever reads the documentation.

item.title: In Soviet Russia chocolate coins eat you!
item.description: So it’s my birthday lunch at work today and I get some chocolate coins left over from the Chinese new year. On the left, Soviets. On the right, Liberty.

item.title: Fun with Powershell
